items.title: Fitting parametric distributions to telemetry
items.description: Engineers model server response times as Exponential(λ) or Log-Normal and estimate λ or μ, σ via MLE so anomaly thresholds reflect the distribution that best explains historical samples.

items.title: Logistic and softmax classifiers
items.description: Training with binary or categorical cross-entropy is numerical MLE of Bernoulli/Categorical parameters given features—standard for spam detection, intent classification, and LLM fine-tuning heads.

items.title: Language model pre-training
items.description: Next-token prediction minimizes average negative log-likelihood of observed tokens under an autoregressive model—MLE at web scale, optimized with stochastic gradient descent on −ℓ(θ).

items.title: A/B test conversion rate estimation
items.description: Product analysts report p̂ = conversions / exposures as Bernoulli MLE, summarizing which variant's success rate is most consistent with observed click data.
